name: AWS
description: AWS Labs core MCP server — entry point to per-service AWS servers (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, …). Scope IAM tightly.

AWS_PROFILE.description: Named AWS credentials profile, supplied as an env var. Use a tightly-scoped role, never admin keys.

AWS_REGION.description: Default AWS region, e.g. us-east-1, supplied as an env var.
